title: Vercel Flags: Platform-native feature flags
whyItMatters: At Vercel, feature flags are how we ship. From new features to model updates in v0, and even infrastructure changes like a production database migration where a flag was the cutover. The v0 team alone runs hundreds at any given moment. Merging code sends a build to production, but the feature flags control whether users can see what changed. Flags let you s…
